3227780.name: Black Paradox Reloaded
3227780.description:
Black Paradox Reloaded takes the fast-paced, roguelite shoot 'em up to new heights.

In this demo, players can jump right into the action by playing through the first two levels of the game, complete with two intense boss fights. As the legendary bounty hunter Black Paradox, you'll face off against the Hellraisers, the galaxy's most notorious criminal syndicate, along with their seven formidable lieutenants.

Key Features

  • Upgraded Visuals: Stunning new pixel art enhances every aspect of the game.
  • Rebalanced Gameplay: Fine-tuned for a smoother, more challenging experience.
  • Extensive Arsenal: 20 unique weapons, 37 powerups, 13 deadly drones, and 8 powerful combos, including the iconic "Black Paradox" move.
  • Stat Upgrades: Enhance your stats and unlock new powers to become even more formidable.
  • Local Co-op Mode: Team up with a friend for double the action and fun.
3227780.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
